name: Alphabet Class C
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at $367.2787. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at $365.0005 where 4 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry $367.2787, stop $340.1937, target $389.7654. Risk/reward is 0.83:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
